title: BEM-832 Claude response writer
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 22:50 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
wf_path=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
wf=read(wf_path)
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
checks=[
 {'name':'dispatcher_workflow_exists','pass':wf_path.exists(),'evidence':str(wf_path)},
 {'name':'uses_claude_action','pass':'anthropics/claude-code-action' in wf or 'claude-code-action' in wf,'evidence':'claude action reference'},
 {'name':'has_anthropic_secret','pass':'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' in wf or 'CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN' in wf,'evidence':'secret env reference'},
 {'name':'has_response_path_instruction','pass':'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt' in wf,'evidence':'mailbox response path in prompt'},
 {'name':'runtime_records_failure','pass':runtime.get('claude_action_outcome')=='failure' or runtime.get('latest',{}).get('outcome')=='failure','evidence':runtime}
]
failed=[c for c in checks if not c['pass']]
# Main diagnosis: runtime starts, but Claude action fails; response file absent.
status='claude_action_failure_needs_provider_or_prompt_repair' if not failed or runtime.get('claude_action_outcome')=='failure' else 'claude_dispatcher_config_incomplete'
next_action='patch dispatcher to record pre/post Claude action diagnostics and create deterministic failure report without faking Claude answer'
state={'bem':'BEM-832','status':status,'checks':checks,'failed_checks':failed,'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'claude_action_outcome':runtime.get('claude_action_outcome'),'workflow_preview':wf[:2000],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem832_diagnose_claude_response_writer.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem832_diagnose_claude_response_writer.md').write_text('# BEM-832 | Diagnose Claude Response Writer | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem832_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-832'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem832_diagnose_claude_response_writer.json','governance/reports/bem832_diagnose_claude_response_writer.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem832_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Diagnosed Claude response writer: dispatcher workflow, Claude action reference, secret references, response path instruction, and runtime failure state')
"""
